app.title: Live Comment Hub
app.subtitle: KomeHub
connection.status.chatNotFound: Chat not found (stream ended or not a live stream)
connection.loginWarning: ⚠ Not logged in: Reactions cannot be captured. Please 'Log in to YouTube'.
apps.title: Apps
config.title: App Settings
config.betaNote: * Beta builds are for development. May be unstable; not recommended for general use. Takes effect on next launch.
manual.title: Manual
manual.intro.title: Introduction
manual.intro.body: Live Comment Hub (KomeHub) displays comment-triggered effects on your YouTube Live stream. Effects for chatting, gaming, and karaoke streams are pre-configured — just install and go.
manual.setup.title: Initial Setup
manual.setup.1: Enter the YouTube Live stream URL and click "Connect". Comments can be captured without logging in.
manual.setup.2: Once connected, the status turns green and comments begin to flow.
manual.setup.3: To also capture reactions (hearts, etc.), click "Log in to YouTube". Comments and Super Chats work without login.
manual.obs.title: Adding Overlays to OBS
manual.obs.1: Drag & drop the URL bar from the app list into your OBS scene, or click to copy it.
manual.obs.2: Set the browser source size to match your stream resolution (e.g. 1920x1080).
manual.obs.3: Each scene has its own URL. If you use multiple scenes, add the URL for each scene you want to switch between.
manual.obs.note: Changes in settings are automatically reflected in OBS browser sources. If not, refresh the browser source.
manual.effects.title: Comment-Triggered Effects
manual.effects.body: Effects for chatting, gaming, and karaoke streams are pre-configured out of the box. Use them as-is or customize to your liking.
manual.effects.1: Adjust effect assets and parameters with sliders and drag-and-drop.
manual.effects.2: To add more effects, use '+ Add Effect' and choose an effect type. Triggers can be keywords (regex supported), Super Chats, or reactions.
manual.effects.3: Use the trigger bar to manually fire effects and preview them.
manual.effects.4: Disable effects with the toggle or delete them if not needed.
manual.effects.types: Built-in effects: Fireworks / Crackers / Falling / Rising / Sprout (comment bubbles) / Slide / Fixed display (Super Chat thanks) / Fullscreen overlay
manual.effects.assets: Assets support PNG / GIF / APNG / WebP / SVG / WebM (transparent video). Sound effects support MP3 / WAV / OGG.
manual.scenes.title: Scene Management
manual.scenes.body: Manage effects and avatar settings as scenes. Switch between scenes to match your stream content.
manual.scenes.create: Create — Click the '+' button in the sidebar to create a new scene.
manual.scenes.duplicate: Duplicate — Right-click a scene to duplicate it with all its effects.
manual.scenes.switch: Switch — Click a scene in the sidebar to switch. OBS browser sources update automatically.
manual.scenes.export: Export/Import — Export scenes or effects as ZIP files and import them on other setups.
manual.scenes.tip: Note: OBS browser sources continue running JavaScript and rendering even when hidden. If things feel heavy with multiple scene sources added, you can remove unused ones from OBS or enable 'Shutdown source when not visible' in the source properties (the page will reload when it becomes visible again).
manual.reactions.title: Reaction Types
manual.backup.title: Backup
manual.backup.body: Back up your effect and scene settings.
manual.backup.auto: Auto backup — A backup is created automatically before each version upgrade.
manual.backup.manual: Manual backup — Create a full backup from the Backup section in settings.
manual.backup.restore: Restore — Pick a backup from the list and restore with one click.
manual.api.title: External Integration (API)
manual.api.body: Integrate with external tools using the SSE / HTTP API.
manual.api.stream: Receive comments, reactions, and effects in real time
manual.api.sceneStream: Receive effect instructions for a specific scene
manual.api.trigger: Manually trigger effects (for StreamDeck integration, etc.)
manual.api.docs: See the API reference on the distribution site for details.
manual.troubleshoot.title: Troubleshooting
manual.troubleshoot.noReaction: Reactions are not captured → Make sure you are logged in to YouTube.
manual.troubleshoot.noChat: "Chat not found" → The stream may have ended or the URL may not be a live stream.
manual.troubleshoot.noOverlay: Overlay is not displayed → Make sure the hub is running. Also verify that the port number in the URL matches.
manual.troubleshoot.noEffect: Effects are not firing → Check that the trigger keyword is correct and the effect is enabled. You can also test manually from the trigger bar.
